pageContext.name: Black Widow
pageContext.description: I don't need a weapon. I am a weapon.   Sideshow presents the Black Widow Fine Art Print by Ian MacDonald, a Marvel art print demonstrating the poise and power of Natasha Romanoff.  Wearing her signature black bodysuit, Black Widow weaves through a web of laser beams and flooded halls. Forced into the light, she strikes her dynamic fighting pose, scarlet hair swept up like a flame in the darkness. The Hydra symbol looms behind Natasha, menacing and ever watchful as the Black Widow infiltrates this foreboding fortress.  Each Black Widow Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity and an authorized, automated artist signature. This action-packed print is available unframed and in a custom framed format in a limited edition of 300 pieces. Additionally, collectors can pair this print with the Black Widow Premium Format™ Figure for the ultimate Black Widow display.  Embolden your Marvel collection with the Widow's might when you bring home the Black Widow Fine Art Print by Ian MacDonald today!
